payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark reddish-brown carved wooden chair back showing repeating rounded vertical cutouts and a glossy finish; front edge of the backrest is cropped at the bottom of the image and the object appears within roughly 0.5 m of the camera.
